channel.title: Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Facade vs Adapter Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Compare facade vs adapter pattern in C# with side-by-side code examples, key structural differences, and guidance on when to use each. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/04/facade-vs-adapter-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: Measuring Manager Effectiveness -- Can You Even Quantify It? - Dev Leader Weekly 138
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I break down how to think about measuring engineering manager effectiveness across technical, project, and people dimensions. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/04/measuring-manager-effectiveness-can-you-even-quantify-it-dev-leader-weekly-138

item.title: C# Regex Performance: GeneratedRegex, Compiled, NonBacktracking, and Timeout
item.description: Optimize C# regex performance with GeneratedRegex source generation, Compiled vs interpreted modes, NonBacktracking O(n) matching, and timeout for ReDoS prevention. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/03/c-regex-performance-generatedregex-compiled-nonbacktracking-and-timeout

item.title: How to Implement Bridge Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement the bridge pattern in C# with step-by-step code examples covering abstraction hierarchies, implementor interfaces, and DI registration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/03/how-to-implement-bridge-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: C# Regex Patterns for Validation: Email, URL, Phone, and Common Inputs
item.description: Build reliable C# regex validation for email, URL, phone, and common inputs using GeneratedRegex, NonBacktracking, and timeout for production safety. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/02/c-regex-patterns-for-validation-email-url-phone-and-common-inputs

item.title: Facade Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master facade pattern best practices in C# including interface segregation, avoiding god objects, dependency injection, and organized subsystem architectures. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/02/facade-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability

item.title: When to Use Enum vs Constants in C#: Decision Guide
item.description: Struggling with enum vs const in C#? This decision guide covers type safety, extensibility, serialization, and the enumeration class pattern to help you choose correctly. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/01/when-to-use-enum-vs-constants-in-c-decision-guide

item.title: Bridge Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the bridge design pattern in C# with practical examples showing abstraction-implementation separation, composition over inheritance, and clean extensible design. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/05/01/bridge-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: C# Enum Switch: Pattern Matching and Exhaustive Checks
item.description: Learn how to use C# enum with switch expressions and pattern matching. Covers exhaustive checks, discard arms, tuple patterns, guard clauses, and compiler warnings. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/30/c-enum-switch-pattern-matching-and-exhaustive-checks

item.title: When to Use Facade Pattern in C#: Decision Guide with Examples
item.description: Discover when to use facade pattern in C# with real decision criteria, use case examples, and guidance on when simpler alternatives work better. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/30/when-to-use-facade-pattern-in-c-decision-guide-with-examples

item.title: C# Enum to String: Conversion Patterns and Best Practices
item.description: Learn every C# enum to string conversion pattern: ToString, Enum.GetName, JsonStringEnumConverter, custom display names, and parsing strings back to enums safely. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/29/c-enum-to-string-conversion-patterns-and-best-practices

item.title: State Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: Build a complete state pattern real-world example in C# with a document workflow system featuring approval states, transitions, and guard conditions. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/29/state-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: C# Enum Flags: Combining Values with Bitwise Operations
item.description: Learn how C# enum flags work. Understand the [Flags] attribute, bitwise OR and AND, HasFlag(), and when to use a flags enum over a regular enum in .NET. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/28/c-enum-flags-combining-values-with-bitwise-operations

item.title: How to Implement Facade Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement facade pattern in C# with a step-by-step guide covering subsystem identification, interface design, and dependency injection setup. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/28/how-to-implement-facade-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: How to Use Enum in C#: Declaration, Values, and Best Practices
item.description: Learn how to use enum in C# from scratch. Covers declaring enums, assigning values, casting, comparing, iterating, and the best practices every C# developer should follow. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/27/how-to-use-enum-in-c-declaration-values-and-best-practices

item.title: State vs Strategy Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Compare state vs strategy pattern in C# with side-by-side code examples, key behavioral differences, and guidance on when to use each. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/27/state-vs-strategy-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: AI Career Fears Are Evolving -- Here's What I'm Hearing - Dev Leader Weekly 137
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I discuss the shifting landscape of AI-related career fears -- from being replaced to being left behind -- and how developers can navigate the change. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/27/ai-career-fears-are-evolving-heres-what-im-hearing-dev-leader-weekly-137
